questions: How long does it take to become flexible?
answers: Flexibility is the ability of muscles and joints to move through their full range of motion. To improve it, practice daily stretching, yoga, or Pilates consistently for at least 4-6 weeks to see noticeable results.

Yes, adults can absolutely improve flexibility at any age! Start with gentle daily stretching, hold each stretch 20-30 seconds, and gradually increase intensity. Yoga is excellent for building overall flexibility.

To improve flexibility, be consistent with daily stretching, warm up before stretching, stay hydrated, and be patient. Focus on tight areas like hamstrings, hip flexors, and shoulders. Never force a stretch to the point of pain.
